title: Mount Tigalalu
summary: Mount Tigalalu at the western side of Halmahera island, Indonesia, is a stratovolcano located at the western end of Kayoa Island. Part of the volcano is flanked by coral limestones.
text: Mount Tigalalu at the western side of Halmahera island, Indonesia, is a stratovolcano located at the western end of Kayoa Island. Part of the volcano is flanked by coral limestones.
